title: elisena marginata
intro: Elisena marginata, also known as the Yellow Bells plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its bright yellow, bell-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elisena marginata include treating respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin infections, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for topical application.
